recap: Belgium's Charles De Ketelaere scored twice and assisted a third goal to dismantle the United States 4-1 in the round of 16, exposing defensive fragility that proved decisive after Malik Tillman's free kick temporarily equalized. American hopes dimmed further when Christian Pulisic suffered a foot injury in the 52nd minute and was substituted out, while goalkeeper Matt Freese's blunder gifted Hans Vanaken Belgium's third goal in the 57th minute. Romelu Lukaku sealed the rout in stoppage time as Belgium extended their unbeaten streak to 18 matches and advanced to face Spain in the semifinals.
